sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الْمَثَلُ: «رُبَّ أَخٍ لَكَ لَمْ تَلِدْهُ أُمُّكَ».
sentences.translation: Poslovica kaže: «Možda imaš brata kojeg tvoja majka nije rodila».
sentences.translationEn: The proverb says: «Perhaps you have a brother your mother did not give birth to».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ الصَّدِيقَ الْوَفِيَّ يَكُونُ كَالأَخِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da vjerni prijatelj može biti poput brata.
sentences.translationEn: This means that a loyal friend can be like a brother.

sentences.arabic: سَاعَدَ بِلَالٌ صَدِيقَهُ حِينَ فَقَدَ عَمَلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Bilal je pomogao svom prijatelju kada je ostao bez posla.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal helped his friend when he lost his job.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الصَّدِيقُ: «أَنْتَ أَخِي وَإِنْ لَمْ نَكُنْ مِنْ أُسْرَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ».
sentences.translation: Prijatelj je rekao: «Ti si moj brat iako nismo iz iste porodice».
sentences.translationEn: The friend said: «You are my brother even though we are not from the same family».
